# SoftenWise

SoftenWise is a software engineering company based in Turkey.
It builds custom software products, mobile applications, integration/automation systems, security audits, and technical consulting services.

## Primary URL
https://softenwise.com/

## Key Pages
- https://softenwise.com/ozel-yazilim.html
- https://softenwise.com/mobil-gelistirme.html
- https://softenwise.com/entegrasyon-otomasyon.html
- https://softenwise.com/guvenlik-denetim.html
- https://softenwise.com/teknik-danismanlik.html
- https://softenwise.com/academy.html
- https://softenwise.com/kariyer.html
- https://softenwise.com/girisim-ortakligi.html
- https://softenwise.com/kaynaklar.html
- https://softenwise.com/yazilim-firmasi-nasil-secilir.html
- https://softenwise.com/ozel-yazilim-maliyeti.html
- https://softenwise.com/mobil-uygulama-gelistirme-sureci.html
